title: Retention boundary proof summary from broker failover stub matrix

rollout_gate_statuses.name: durable_publish_ack
rollout_gate_statuses.detail: Retention-boundary evidence does not independently classify replicated publish acknowledgements.

rollout_gate_statuses.name: replay_checkpoint_alignment
rollout_gate_statuses.detail: Expired checkpoints fail closed and require an explicit reset before replay resumes from the retained sequence domain.

rollout_gate_statuses.name: retention_boundary_visibility
rollout_gate_statuses.detail: The scenario surfaces the retention floor, marks the stale checkpoint as expired, and requires an explicit operator reset.

rollout_gate_statuses.name: live_fanout_isolation
rollout_gate_statuses.detail: Retention-boundary validation does not measure live fanout lag isolation.

focus_scenarios.operator_guidance: checkpoint expired behind retention floor; explicit reset to sequence 3 required
